title: T6 isYours partition coverage
prompt:
Open tests/run-headless.js. In the SOLVE / HANDS / BACKING section, after the existing 'every note is yours, backing, or skip' assertion, add THREE new assertions using the helper ok(condition, message) that verify the P.isYours(note) helper directly:
1. ok(P.isYours({}) === true, 'a plain note (not backing, not skip) is yours')
2. ok(P.isYours({backing:true}) === false, 'a backing note is not yours')
3. ok(P.isYours({skip:true}) === false, 'a skipped note is not yours')
Use the existing ok helper. Edit ONLY tests/run-headless.js. Do not create, import, or add any other files.
